ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: IF( AND( ISPICKVAL( leaseworks__Rate_Based_On__c , 'Ratio Table') , OR( ISBLANK( TEXT(leaseworks__Ratio_Table_Choice__c)), ISBLANK( TEXT(leaseworks__Derate_Choice__c)))) , true, false)
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please provide Ratio Table Choice/Derate Choice for the system to calculate the maintenance reserve based on the Ratio Table for Supplemental Rent Rate
